plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Runs any task as a self-updating, file-backed living plan you can watch: a background planner decomposes it, spawns waves of role subagents, and loops build→check until the check converges or stalls. Auto-detects which repos a task touches and works in per-repo feature/<ticket> worktrees (never master/dev). Local, Opus 4.8 / xhigh.
